/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/frank_starling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/starling_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/pressure_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/heart_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/pressure_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/motor_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o heart_controller  -lpthread
